title: NEW NARRATIVE - 211info
text: NEW NARRATIVE MILL PARK CENTER NEW NARRATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services, including case management, cognitive and creative therapy, skills training, employment assistance, assistance obtaining benefits and entitlements, prescriber services, medication monitoring (must be an active participant in behavioral health counseling), money management, medical coordination, and peer-delivered services. Cannot provide neurological assessments for ADHD or autism. Currently unable to offer medication management to new intakes. 1952 SE 122nd Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Individuals with severe and persistent mental health conditions Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (503) 726-3764 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Other (503) 726-3764 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake. If voicemail option is given, please leave full name, date of birth, and Oregon Health Plan (OHP) identification number. FEES: Varies, accepts OHP DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Integrated Co-Occurring Disorders Treatment Mental Health Evaluation Peer Counseling Psychiatric Case Management If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEW NARRATIVE MILL PARK CENTER
